task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to the IKEA store in East Palo Alto.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Satellite view centered on the large IKEA building (often blue and yellow or white roof) at coordinates approx 37.4683, -122.1325.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a polygon outlining the roof of the IKEA building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored polygon overlay or measurement line tracing the perimeter of the IKEA building's roof.

task_completion.description: The measurement tool or dialog displays the area of the drawn polygon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Measurements' tab or dialog box showing an 'Area' value. The value should be approximately 280,000 to 310,000 square feet (or equivalent in other units).
The 'Name' field in the placemark properties dialog contains the text 'IKEA East Palo Alto - Solar Assessment'.

task_completion.description: Agent populates the description with required details (area, orientation, note).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the dialog contains text mentioning the measured area, a compass orientation (e.g., 'Flat', 'South'), and a note about solar suitability.

task_completion.description: The new placemark is saved and visible in the 'My Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left) lists 'IKEA East Palo Alto - Solar Assessment' under the 'My Places' folder.

integrity.description: Agent uses the software GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with map tools, toolbars, and dialog boxes (e.g., Google Earth Pro interface) rather than command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: The area result is derived from the drawing tool, not external lookup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use a web browser to search for 'IKEA East Palo Alto roof area'. The area figure in the description corresponds to the measurement shown in the tool.

integrity.description: The polygon actually covers the target building.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawn shape roughly matches the footprint of the IKEA building, rather than being a random shape or covering a different building.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: IKEA East Palo Alto (37.4683, -122.1325). The building has a large footprint of approximately 290,000 to 297,000 square feet. Acceptable measurement values in screenshots should fall between 280,000 and 310,000 sq ft.
